message:
feat(buffer): Add pixel rendering and unicode search utilities

New features for high-resolution terminal graphics:

1. PixelBuffer and GrayscaleBuffer types for pixel-based rendering
2. Quadrant block rendering (2x2 pixels per terminal cell)
3. Grayscale intensity mapping with ASCII/Unicode shaders
4. Unicode search utilities for line breaks, tabs, and wrap points
5. Rgba::luminance() for brightness calculations
6. Convenience methods on OptimizedBuffer for text/editor view rendering

Also fixes clippy must_use_candidate warnings in search.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
